channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: OpenAI's Dean Ball warns open-weight models delay AGI development
item.description: Critics compared his claims to Steve Ballmer's anti-Linux rhetoric.
item.content:encoded:
Critics compared his claims to Steve Ballmer's anti-Linux rhetoric.

Original source: https://x.com/deanwball/status/2078133895766114412

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/b438665c

  • Views: 908,681
  • Likes: 12,714
  • Bookmarks: 1,231
  • Quotes: 105
  • Replies: 629
  • Posts: 66

  • Russ Salakhutdinov
  • Eric Jang
  • Edward Grefenstette
  • Nathan Lambert

item.title: Anthropic limits Claude Fable 5 access on premium plans
item.description: Pro and Team Standard tiers transition to credit-based access.
item.content:encoded:
Pro and Team Standard tiers transition to credit-based access.

Original source: https://support.claude.com/en/articles/15910845-claude-code-may-july-2026-weekly-limits-promotion

item.title: OpenAI's Dean Ball quits public writing on X following backlash
item.description: Critics accused him of bias after he criticized open-weight models.
item.content:encoded:
Critics accused him of bias after he criticized open-weight models.

Original source: https://twitter.com/deanwball/status/2078477218406142429

item.title: Chamath Palihapitiya warns restricting open-source AI harms US competitiveness
item.description: Proprietary tokens could cost US firms 50 times more.
item.content:encoded:
Proprietary tokens could cost US firms 50 times more.

Original source: https://apnews.com/article/kimi-k3-china-ai-0d8a5e268deb11a673f4d444fc597cc5

item.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi-K3 tops Frontend Code Arena
item.description: It matches Claude Fable 5 performance at 35% cost.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: US data centers use 31 times less water than golf courses

item.title: Humanoid robots fight in live MMA matches in Shenzhen

item.title: François Fleuret doubts eight H100s can run 3-trillion-parameter Kimi 3
item.description: Zephyr suggests Huawei SuperPoDs or NVL72 systems are required.
item.content:encoded:
Zephyr suggests Huawei SuperPoDs or NVL72 systems are required.

Original source: https://github.com/antirez/ds4
